title: phillyrea angustifolia var. rosmarinifolia
intro: Phillyrea angustifolia var. rosmarinifolia, also known as the narrow-leaved phillyrea or rosemary-leaved phillyrea, is a variety of flowering plant in the family Oleaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Phillyrea angustifolia var. rosmarinifolia include its ability to alleviate respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds, and to soothe digestive problems. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
